prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The field condition for P-101 Spool erection & fit-up is compared with the referenced drawing or manufacturer sheet. Tags, ratings, and layout callouts line up with the installed work, and the revision block shown is current. Source anchors for review: ASME B31.3, project iso drawings.
title: T1 P-101 Compliant Document interpretation
